title: eurya oblongifolia
intro: Eurya oblongifolia, also known as the oval-leaved eurya, is a plant species in the family Theaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Eurya oblongifolia include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Eurya oblongifolia is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
